description: Letter from Nissim b. Ḥalfon, from Damsis, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1055. The writer expresses his wishes that the addressee will recover from his illness. Also writes about receiving payment for shipments of asphalt and nuts. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #591) VMR
description_he: מכתב מ-Shubrā Damsīs. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
